title: ‘Malvinas are Argentinian’: World Cup holders celebrate win over England with Falklands banner
summary_full: Banner refers to Falkland Islands conflict in 1982UK business secretary calls for Fifa investigation The Argentina players celebrated their World Cup win over England with a banner saying “Las Malvinas son Argentinas”, making reference to the 1982 Falklands war.Argentina were 1-0 down with five minutes to go of the semi-final in Atlanta but rallied and scored twice in quick succession to reach a second straight World Cup final, where they will face Spain in New Jersey on Sunday. Continue reading...
